{{CargoRelic
|name=Standing Bear Award
|class_id=20070
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=The highest award of the Burlin International Film Festival. The trophy is a statue of a bear with its arms raised to greet people. The main awards include Best Feature Film, Best Documentary, Best Science and Education Film, and Best Art Film.
|fame=13
|art=18
|fth=14
|civ=28
|tech=17
|ss1=Per 100 Avatar Score, Snail HP +10<br>Avatar Score: 5000/5000
|ss2=Per 100 Avatar Score, Snail HP +20<br>Avatar Score: 5000/5000
|ss3=Per 100 Avatar Score, Snail HP +30<br>Avatar Score: 5000/5000
|ss4=Per 100 Avatar Score, Snail HP +30<br>Avatar Score: 5000/5000
|ss7=Per 100 Avatar Score, Snail HP +30<br>Avatar Score: 5000/5000<br> (Awakened)
}}
